/usr/bin/clang++ -g -arch arm64 -Wl,-search_paths_first -Wl,-headerpad_max_install_names CMakeFiles/conveyor_gui.dir/conveyor_gui_autogen/mocs_compilation.cpp.o CMakeFiles/conveyor_gui.dir/src/guiMain.cpp.o CMakeFiles/conveyor_gui.dir/src/MainWindow.cpp.o -o conveyor_gui.app/Contents/MacOS/conveyor_gui -F/Users/maliha/Qt/6.10.2/macos/lib  -Wl,-rpath,/Users/maliha/Qt/6.10.2/macos/lib libconveyor_core.a /Users/maliha/Qt/6.10.2/macos/lib/QtWidgets.framework/Versions/A/QtWidgets /Users/maliha/Qt/6.10.2/macos/lib/QtGui.framework/Versions/A/QtGui -framework AppKit -framework OpenGL -framework ImageIO -framework Metal /Users/maliha/Qt/6.10.2/macos/lib/QtCore.framework/Versions/A/QtCore -framework IOKit -framework DiskArbitration -framework UniformTypeIdentifiers
